blockingIssues.description: `dualvm/contracts/LendingCore.sol` still exposes public `publishCurrentQuoteTicket()` and `publishProjectedBorrowQuoteTicket()` entry points, so arbitrary EOAs can continue forcing quote-ticket publication through LendingCore and the intended storage-griefing closure is incomplete.

`dualvm/lib/deployment/deployMarketVersion.ts` deploys the new AccessManaged RiskAdapter but does not wire `ROLE_IDS.LENDING_CORE` to `quoteViaTicket()`, leaving versions created by that helper partially unusable until callers manually patch AccessManager permissions.

`dualvm/contracts/precompiles/XcmLiquidationNotifier.sol` always sends the hard-coded `0x05040a` ClearOrigin message, so borrower, debt, and collateral data are never embedded into the outbound XCM payload as required.

`dualvm/scripts/deployXcmFullIntegration.ts` only attempts the required Polkadot docs sample payload if a minimal ClearOrigin execute call fails; because the minimal call succeeds, the deployment artifact records the docs sample as `not attempted`, so the live execute-proof requirement is unmet.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/architecture.md` to reflect the milestone-6 RiskAdapter architecture (inline deterministic math + optional DeterministicRiskModel verification) and documented the current `deployMarketVersion()` RiskAdapter wiring gap discovered in scrutiny.

Updated `.factory/library/xcm-precompile.md` with XCM V5 destination/message encoding notes, PAS-funding requirements for execute flows, and the current scrutiny gap around the unattempted docs-sample payload.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify how milestone features that include required live testnet deployment/proof steps should be handled: either explicitly allow the solidity worker to perform those steps when the feature contract says so, or require the orchestrator to split the live-proof work into a deployment-worker feature.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `xcm-full-integration` feature description required live deployment/proof commands, but the reviewer found `.factory/skills/solidity-worker/SKILL.md` still says live testnet deployment should be deferred to the deployment worker. The worker followed the feature contract rather than the current skill text.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document the batch-liquidation bad-debt test setup quirk in shared state.
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected as too feature-specific and test-local; the note is useful for that single suite but not broad enough to justify a shared library entry for future workers.
